# City Global Digital Studio - Photography Portfolio Website

A React + Vite portfolio website for photography services, deployable to GitHub Pages.

## Project Setup Steps

- [x] Create project structure and configuration
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Verify build and development setup
- [x] Create React components
- [x] Test and validate

## Key Features
- Hero section with tagline
- Service categories (Wedding, Engagement, Maternity, Birthdays, Baby Shoot, Pre-Wedding)
- Photo gallery/portfolio section
- Team information
- Contact form
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- GitHub Pages deployment ready

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build
- `npm run deploy` - Deploy to GitHub Pages

## Deployment
Update `package.json` with your GitHub repository URL:
```json
"homepage": "https://your-username.github.io/your-repo-name"
```

Then run `npm run deploy` to push to GitHub Pages.
